_comment: deploy/github_posture.json — the DOCUMENTED GitHub-side control posture (#1320, epic #1355).
This file is the machine-readable mirror of what the docs claim; deploy/drift_sentinel.py's
check_github_config()/check_github_push_runs() GET-assert live GitHub state against it weekly.
RULES: (1) every entry carries a `source` naming the doc that makes the claim — this file
declares the documented posture, never a wish; (2) a PR that amends the claiming docs (e.g.
the #1319 approval-gate fork) MUST flip the matching entry in the same PR, or the sentinel
will honestly report the divergence every Monday; (3) never run black on this file (JSON).

environment_production.name: production
environment_production.source: ADR-065 ('CI's production approval gate stays intact') + CLAUDE.md CI/CD section + ci-cd.yml ('requires manual approval via GitHub Environment: production'). RESOLVED 2026-07-20: the gate is LIVE again (required_reviewers, 1 reviewer) — restored after the public flip made env protection available; the 2026-07-13 private flip had silently dropped it (#1319, closed VERIFIED-DONE). A future private flip drops it AGAIN — see project_repo_visibility memory for the flip-back checklist.

main_ruleset.source: docs/CONVENTIONS.md drift-discovery table + docs/MANAGED_WHERE_LEDGER.md (#1325): exactly main-block-force-push-and-deletion, rules [deletion, non_fast_forward] only, enforcement active, no pull_request/required_status_checks rule.

vulnerability_alerts.source: ci-cd.yml pip-audit advisory step ('Dependabot will open a bump PR for the affected package') + ADR-082 (Dependabot is the CVE remediation channel). RESOLVED 2026-07-20: alerts ENABLED live (owner toggle after the public flip; SDLC finding P2-4 closed).

push_run_detector.source: #1544: six consecutive squash merges to main (2026-07-19 16:17-19:20 UTC) produced ZERO push-event workflow runs — not red, ABSENT. A trigger-matching merge with no queued run within grace_minutes is the alarm condition.
